sentences.english: Today the weather is really nice.
The sky is clear and the temperature is about twenty-two degrees.
Yesterday it rained all day, so I stayed home.
sentences.korean: 어제는 하루 종일 비가 와서 집에 있었어요.

sentences.english: But today I want to go for a walk in the park, because the air feels fresh after the rain.
I hope the weather stays like this all week.
sentences.korean: 이번 주 내내 이런 날씨였으면 좋겠어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
